TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live Women's International T20 Cricket
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: New Zealand v South Africa-5th T20
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage from the fifth and final T20 in the series from Hagley Oval in Christchurch. This is only the third T20 series between the two countries and the first since October 2023. The visitors have never won a series against New Zealand in this format and lost their only T20 multi-game contest in the country back in early 2020. South Africa faced the Kiwi's in five matches with the hosts eventually winning 3-1.

TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage from the fifth and final T20 in the series from Hagley Oval in Christchurch. The visitors will be looking to end the series on a high and gain revenge after a hammering by the Kiwi's in the semi-finals of the T20 World Cup at the start of the month. Finn Allen hit a record-breaking 33-ball hundred to lead New Zealand to a nine-wicket victory and their second T20 final inside five years.

Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO2.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Brutalist
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Bodies Bodies Bodies
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When a group of 20-somethings gets stuck at a remote mansion during a hurricane, a party game gone very, very wrong ends with a dead body on the ground and fake friends at every turn as they try to find the killer among them.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Women Is Losers
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Celina Guerrera attempts to rise above poverty in 1960s San Francisco.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Spectacular Now
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Janes
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the pre-Roe v. Wade era, female activists calling themselves "Jane" built an underground network for women with unwanted pregnancies and provide low-cost and free illegal abortions to an estimated 11,000 women.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Town
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants out of his criminal life, but that could threaten Claire.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Warfare
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Real Women Have Curves
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Curves on a blossoming young woman can be sexy, but not if you are told you have too many of them. "Real Women Have Curves" is a humorous and warmhearted look at a Mexican-American teenage girl coming of age in a boiling cauldron of cultural expectations, class constrictions, family duty, and her own personal aspirations.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Get Out
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Now that Chris and his girlfriend, Rose, have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway with Missy and Dean. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries leads him to a truth that he never could have imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: How We Get Free
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Over the course of two years, Elisabeth Epps works to end cash bail on all fronts, from bailing people out of jail to running for office as one of the first abolitionist candidates in Colorado.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wit
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Professor Vivian Bearing (Emma Thompson), an expert on the work of 17th-century British poet John Donne, has spent her adult life contemplating religion and death as literary motifs. Diagnosed with advanced ovarian cancer, she consents to an aggressive and experimental form of chemotherapy administered by Dr. Kelekian (Christopher Lloyd) and his assistant, Dr. Posner (Jonathan M. Woodward), her former student. Facing death on a personal level, she reflects on her life and work.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Sinners
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Superman
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When Superman gets drawn into conflicts at home and abroad, his actions are questioned, giving tech billionaire Lex Luthor the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Superman's four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before it's too late?

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Great Lillian Hall
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Broadway actress Lillian Hall pours her heart and soul into preparing for her next big role but finds herself blindsided by confusion and forgetfulness. She strives to make it to opening night while holding on to her fading memories and identity.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Terminator
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Moonlight
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Gia
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Gia Carangi (Angelina Jolie) travels to New York City with dreams of becoming a fashion model. Within minutes of arriving, she meets Wilhelmina Cooper (Faye Dunaway), a wise and high-powered agent who takes Gia under her wing. With Cooper's help and her own natural instincts, Gia quickly shoots to the top of the modeling world. When Cooper dies of lung cancer, however, Gia turns to drugs -- and both she and her career begin to spiral out of control.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Vying for a spot in the U.S. Open finals, Anthony "Simo" Simonsen and Australia's Jason "Belmo" Belmonte face off as tempers escalate and injuries flare.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Drag Me to Hell
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Christine Brown has a loving boyfriend and a good job at a Los Angeles bank. Her heavenly life becomes hellish when, in an effort to impress her boss, she denies an old woman's request for an extension on her home loan. In retaliation, the crone places a curse on Christine, threatening her soul with eternal damnation. Christine seeks a psychic's help to break the curse, but the price to save her soul may be more than she can pay.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Insidious
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Insidious: Chapter 3
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When teenager Quinn Brenner (Stefanie Scott) senses that her late mother is trying to contact her, she seeks help from gifted psychic Elise Rainier (Lin Shaye). However, Elise's tragic past makes her reluctant to use her abilities. After Quinn is attacked by a malevolent entity, her father (Dermot Mulroney) pleads with Elise for help. With support from two parapsychologists, Elise ventures deep into The Further -- where she finds a powerful demon with an insatiable craving for human souls.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Meg 2: The Trench
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Margaret
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: New York high-school student Lisa Cohen (Anna Paquin) inadvertently causes an accident in which a bus driver (Mark Ruffalo) runs over a pedestrian (Allison Janney). Guilt-stricken over her role in the woman's death, Lisa's mood swings from normal to furious, with her angry outbursts mostly directed at her mother (J. Smith-Cameron). The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Like Water for Chocolate
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Dos jóvenes locamente enamorados tienen que separarse por decisión de la madre de ella. Entre olores y sabores de la comida mexicana, el sufrimiento será enorme y largo.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Un triángulo amoroso entre tres adultos que sufren de crisis de la mediana edad termina con la muerte de uno de ellos.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Mac y Kelly acaban de tener una bebé adorable y se han comprado una preciosa casa en las afueras de la ciudad. Los problemas comienzan cuando descubren que sus nuevos vecinos son los miembros de una fraternidad cuyo presidente es Teddy Sanders.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una actriz de televisión trata desesperadamente de revivir su carrera.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver está viviendo el sueño americano. Él tiene un buen trabajo, una casa preciosa, niños excelentes y una esposa hermosa, llamada Emily. Sin embargo, la aparente vida perfecta de Cal se derrumba cuando descubre que Emily le ha sido infiel y quiere divorciarse. Ahora, con más de 40 años, e inesperadamente soltero, Cal ingresa al vicioso mundo de las citas románticas. Jacob Palmer decide ayudar a Cal y le enseña a tener éxito con las damas.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: My Favorite Shapes by Julio Torres
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: El comediante Julio Torres explora sus formas favoritas, que se presentan a través de una cinta transportadora industrial y sirven de punto de partida para historias fantásticas, anécdotas y chistes.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Ambientada en un campus universitario, se centra en la complicada relación de un autor con su hija.

ACC.Network.us2.title: ACC Network Football Podcast
ACC.Network.us2.description: This podcast covers all things ACC football. Hosted by first round NFL Draft pick and former Florida State quarterback EJ Manuel and former Georgia Tech running back Roddy Jones.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 1 (1954-1957)
ACC.Network.us2.description: When Indiana native Everett Case arrives in Raleigh to become the coach at North Carolina State, his vision spearheads not just the rise of college basketball at his school and in the region, but the start of a conference that will change the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 2 (1958-1968)
ACC.Network.us2.description: From Frank McGuire to Bones McKinney and Vic Bubas, new coaches emerge to challenge the early success of Everett Case. It all precedes a final poignant moment of triumph for Case at the only home the ACC Tournament has, until this point, ever known.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 3 (1966-1972)
ACC.Network.us2.description: After a rough start, North Carolina's Dean Smith comes to be known for both dominance and dignity, playing a central role in desegregating the ACC with the recruitment of Charlie Scott, who emerges as a star on some of Smith's greatest teams.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 4 (1973-1974)
ACC.Network.us2.description: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 5 (1975-1980)
ACC.Network.us2.description: Dean Smith's North Carolina teams may be the class of the ACC, but rivals also flourish, including a Virginia team led by Wally Walker, and a Duke program that re-emerges with a championship run in 1978 and a controversial title two years later.

ACC.Network.us2.title: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball
ACC.Network.us2.subtitle: Episode 6 (1981-1983)
ACC.Network.us2.description: Virginia's Ralph Sampson earns national player of the year honors three times, but never wins the ACC Tournament. Dean Smith seeks a title with freshman Michael Jordan, and the charismatic Jim Valvano leads NC State on a memorable Cinderella run.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: A year after his heroics in L.A., detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is mixed up in another terrorist plot, this time at Washington Dulles International Airport, where he is waiting for his wife (Bonnie Bedelia). That same night, South American politico and drug profiteer Ramon Esperanza (Franco Nero) is arriving in U.S. custody. McClane takes action when a treasonous ex-colonel (William Sadler) seizes control of the airport, threatening to crash every inbound flight unless Esperanza is freed.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard
AMC.HD.us2.description: New York City policeman John McClane is visiting his estranged wife and two daughters on Christmas Eve. He joins her at a holiday party in the headquarters of the Japanese-owned business she works for. But the festivities are interrupted by a group of terrorists who take over the exclusive high-rise, and everyone in it. Very soon McClane realizes that there's no one to save the hostages -- but him.

AMC.HD.us2.title: London Has Fallen
AMC.HD.us2.description: After the death of the British prime minister, the world's most powerful leaders gather in London to pay their respects. Without warning, terrorists unleash a devastating attack that leaves the city in chaos and ruins. Secret Service agent Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) springs into action to bring U.S. President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) to safety. When Asher falls into the hands of the sinister organization, it's up to Banning to save his commander in chief from a horrible fate.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Italian Job
AMC.HD.us2.description: After a heist in Venice, Steve turns on his partners in crime, killing safecracker John Bridger and keeping all the gold for himself; the rest of the team, including leader Charlie Croker, driver Handsome Rob, explosives man Left Ear and tech geek Lyle, vows revenge; they enlist the help of Bridger's daughter, Stella and plot to recover the gold from Steve's Los Angeles mansion.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Olympus Has Fallen

The building is overrun, and President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) and his staff are taken hostage. Luckily for Asher, former presidential security officer Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) is on the scene. With time running out, it's up to Banning to locate Asher's son before the extremists do and rescue the president before his captors unleash their ultimate plan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Law Abiding Citizen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Clyde Shelton is an honorable family man, until the day his wife and daughter are murdered in a home invasion. He hopes for justice, but a rising prosecutor named Nick Rice cuts a deal with one of the killers in exchange for testimony. Ten years later, that man is found dead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
AMC.HD.us2.description: Living undercover in Brazil, master assassin Arthur Bishop (Jason Statham) springs back into action after an old enemy (Sam Hazeldine) kidnaps the woman (Jessica Alba) he loves. To save her life, Bishop must kill an imprisoned African warlord, a human trafficker (Toby Eddington) and an arms dealer (Tommy Lee Jones), all while making the deaths look like accidents. Luckily for Asher, former presidential security officer Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) is on the scene. With time running out, it's up to Banning to locate Asher's son before the extremists do and rescue the president before his captors unleash their ultimate plan.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Enemy of the State
AMC.HD.us2.description: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. When a videotape of the murder ends up in the hands of Robert Clayton Dean (Will Smith), a labor lawyer and dedicated family man, he is framed for murder. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunt for Red October

Equipped with innovative stealth technology, Ramius' submarine, "Red October," is virtually invisible. However, when an American sub briefly detects the Russians' presence, CIA agent Jack Ryan sets out to determine Ramius' motives, fearing he may launch an attack on the U.S.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aunque te duela, no quiero ser madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Maya asegura que, aunque su madre insista en querer un nieto, ella no está interesada en la maternidad. Su mamá, obsesionada con la idea, llega al punto de tratar a un peluche como un bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sueño vs. droga; Falsa menor de edad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La novia de Juan Luis pide un reembolso del dinero con el que financió un restaurante. Irenia exige compensación, la expulsaron de la escuela por matricular a Ruby, quien no era menor de edad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Adicto a mi madre; Fanático sin sentido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana le exige indemnización al pastor que abusaba sexualmente de su madre y lo responsabiliza por su suicidio. Víctor aloja en su casa al exmarido de su esposa, ella demanda que lo saque.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula tiene 24 horas para cruzar la mercancía de los colombianos y quiere a Diego como su guía, ya que él sabe moverse por el desierto. Joselito está dispuesto a darle la ubicación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mensajero privado; Los modelos reales
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Karla usa una aplicación de teléfono para sus compras y se hizo amiga del mensajero, su esposo la acusa de tener sexo oral con él. Un psicólogo trata a sus pacientes con un método peculiar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cazadora cazada; La obsesión
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Vaneska se casa con Eduardo y comete el error de poner todo su dinero a nombre de él. También, Alejandro quiere recibir terapia de pareja con su esposa Carla para así salvar su matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Te quiero, te respeto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hugo está en la cárcel acusado de matar a Rodolfo, cuya esposa decide vengarse. La injusticia afecta a toda la familia tanto que pierden su casa y su negocio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Aunque te duela, no quiero ser madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Maya asegura que, aunque su madre insista en querer un nieto, ella no está interesada en la maternidad. Su mamá, obsesionada con la idea, llega al punto de tratar a un peluche como un bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los contaminados; Hija en disputa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego y Armando trabajan en el bar de Minerva y la demandan por las condiciones de trabajo. Mariana pide la custodia de su sobrina porque la madre es una drogadicta que inventa enfermedades.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Propiedad violada; App para enfermedades sexuales
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura destruyó el dron de Gino que volaba sobre su propiedad, él pide que se lo pague. Mileidy crea una aplicación para identificar enfermedades sexuales y descubre que su esposo es infiel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Destino inesperado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Martha sueña con casarse y ser madre pero es muy exigente. Mientras tanto, Catia tiene a su bebé a escondidas de su madre y deja al niño en la basura.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tú eres todo lo que tengo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alina no se lleva bien con su suegra, ya que ella la maltrata con saña después de la muerte de su hijo Alberto. Al quedarse con su otro hijo, Marcelo, descubre sus jugadas sucias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La larga espera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Catalina y Pedro se aman, pero el padre de ella se opone. Él decide irse a Estados Unidos y ella se casa con Julián, quien está muriendo de cáncer. Sin embargo, a pesar de la larga espera, el destino vuelve a reunirlos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe quiere reclutar a Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula tiene 24 horas para cruzar la mercancía de los colombianos y quiere a Diego como su guía, ya que él sabe moverse por el desierto. Joselito está dispuesto a darle la ubicación.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muy cerca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los esposos Patricia y Edgar quieren el set de recámara infantil, lograrlo depende del primer sex symbol mundial. Consuelo y Estela juegan para llevarse un Arréglame mi casa y casi lo logran.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El castigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sara comprende que hay cosas que van más allá de lo que considera debe resolver, descubre que la muerte de su esposo y su hijo forman parte de un secreto y tiene que resolver el enigma.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi papá se lleva a pistear a mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Magdalena quiere que su padre, Alfredo, deje de llevar a su nieto a fiestas y a lugares nocturnos con mujeres. El abuelo insiste en que él ya es un hombre y debe aprender las cosas de la vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dedos de hielo; Almas gemelas asesinas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana sufre del síndrome de Raynaud que provoca sensibilidad al frío en los dedos, no quiere mudarse a otra ciudad. Nancy fue secuestrada y ahora siente una conexión especial con su captor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Billetes en carretera; Cambio de edad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María y Paula causaron un alboroto ante las intimidaciones de Andrés y Sebastián, ellos las demandan. Elvis miente sobre su edad en papeles oficiales y le niegan la ayuda a su hijo autista.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe llega a casa de Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Con los datos que Joselito le entregó, Circe confirma con sus propios ojos quién es la mujer que le robó a su hombre. Joselito visita a Gavino en la cárcel. Deivid recibe un balazo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Difamado por venganza; La novia loca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anthony fue investigado por el delito de pornografía infantil, él cree que su suegra lo incriminó. Lina tiene obsesión con casarse, pero Carlos no quiere poner en riesgo su estatus migratorio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Abusado por mi héroe; Testigo ilegal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alejandro fue abusado de niño por un creador de videojuegos, exige compensación aunque su atacante está muerto. Cristian testifica en la corte y lo arrestan, ahora quiere recuperar a su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Te llevaré en mi corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Graciela vive amargada por la muerte de su hijo y su hermana trata de ayudarla, pero ella no lo permite.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi papá se lleva a pistear a mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Magdalena quiere que su padre, Alfredo, deje de llevar a su nieto a fiestas y a lugares nocturnos con mujeres. El abuelo insiste en que él ya es un hombre y debe aprender las cosas de la vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los no nacidos; Mi abuelo el influencer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sol quiere abrir un cementerio para bebés no nacidos, pero su esposo se niega. Un "influencer" hace un acuerdo con una funeraria para darle promoción; descubren que sus seguidores eran falsos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi nieto abandonado en el aeropuerto; Falsa fortuna
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Grisel quiere la custodia de su nieto porque la mamá, Gabriela, casi lo deja abandonado en el aeropuerto. Además, Edgar encuentra pepitas de oro dentro de los salmones que le vendió Rubén.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La demoledora cuarta pregunta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las hermanas Amayrani y Yisel vienen por el dinero en efectivo, pero la inclemente cuarta pregunta desata mucha tensión. Sayda y Balam quieren llevarse todos los premios de la jaula.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las manos del corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Marcia tiene autismo y su situación se complica a medida que el niño crece. Sin embargo, Leonardo encuentra en la música la vía para expresar con sus manos lo que está en su corazón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Destinos cruzados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carlos pierde la esperanza de jugar fútbol profesional cuando un borracho le parte una pierna. Dos años después, el destino le pone en su vida a la persona que lo ayudará a levantarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sueño trunchado; Humillado y sin dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio no quiere que su hija sea futbolista, porque no tendrá buen futuro, su madre pide la tutela de la joven. Los dueños de una casa confundieron a su empleado con un ladrón y lo lesionaron.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hermano está lucrando con mi enfermedad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis denuncia que su hermano, Fernando, se aprovecha de su enfermedad para pedir dinero a la gente. Además, su ex le impide ver a su hija porque no quiere que la niña lo vea en ese estado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Béisbol MLB
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Primer juego de la serie regular de la MLB 2026. Arizona Diamondbacks visita a Los Angeles Dodgers. Desde el Dodger Stadium, en Los Ángeles, California.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Isabel y Diego se reconcilian
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras la visita de Circe, Diego se sincera con Isabel y le cuenta toda la verdad sobre su pasado y sus fechorías. Prometen empezar de nuevo. Marlene sospecha de Augusto. Joselito trama un plan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El bebé de mami; La looner
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Omaira pide que su suegra desaloje la casa porque interfiere constantemente en su matrimonio y su esposo actúa como un bebé de mamá. Lina hace videos eróticos con globos de diferentes tamaños.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LaLiga FC Futures Mundial sub12
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Fase de grupos
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Brunete (Madrid) acoge la primera edición del Mundial sub12 del 25 al 29 de marzo. Este torneo reúne a 20 clubes de élite de cinco continentes que lucharán por alzarse con el triunfo.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Real Sociedad B - Granada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Real B quiere continuidad con balón y presión tras pérdida para instalarse arriba sin desordenarse. El Granada busca verticalidad y pegada; si domina las áreas y la estrategia, puede inclinar un partido muy táctico.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LaLiga FC Futures Mundial sub12
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Fase de grupos
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Brunete (Madrid) acoge la primera edición del Mundial sub12 del 25 al 29 de marzo. Este torneo reúne a 20 clubes de élite de cinco continentes que lucharán por alzarse con el triunfo.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Las Palmas - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La UD pretende imponer paciencia con balón y último pase para someter en campo rival. El Sporting buscará ritmo por fuera y carga del área; si Las Palmas resiste el primer empuje, el partido puede decidirse en detalle y estrategia.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Eibar
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Andorra intentará gobernar con posesiones largas y pasillos interiores, cuidando la pérdida para evitar transiciones. El Eibar sube el ritmo con presión y centros laterales; la eficacia en el último pase y el balón parado pueden romper el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Mirandés - Valladolid
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Anduva favorece el ida y vuelta: Mirandés intenso tras robo y con llegada por fuera. El Valladolid intentará gobernar desde banda y centros tensos; la gestión de pérdidas y las segundas jugadas marcarán el resultado.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Racing - Albacete
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Sardinero eleva el voltaje: Racing fuerte en duelos, centros al segundo palo y transiciones rápidas. El Alba buscará pausa y claridad entre líneas; si compite rechaces y ajusta el balón parado, puede sostener un partido de marcador corto.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Córdoba - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Andorra - Eibar

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Deportivo - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Riazor exige mando: el Dépor quiere dominar desde banda y centros precisos para empujar hacia la zona alta. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, prioriza solidez y eficacia; si protege su área y compite los rechaces, podrá rascar en un duelo de detalles.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Große Turniere wie Welt- und Europameisterschaften, aber auch die Champions League oder der UEFA-Cup sind ideale Bühnen, auf denen sich Fußballspieler einen Namen machen, und ihren Marktwert steigern können. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Portugal! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Primeira Liga (27. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Sendung informiert über die Highlights und alle Tore in den aktuellen Spielen im portugiesischen Fußball. Die Erste Liga bietet unterhaltsame Spiele auf allerhöchstem Niveau. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Scooore! – Internationales Fußball-Magazin
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Tore und Ergebnisse international
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Gezeigt werden Szenen aus der Eredivisie (Niederlande), Liga NOS (Portugal), Hyundai A-League (Australien), J. League (Japan) sowie die Copa Libertadores, Copa Sudamericana und Copa do Brasil. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Primeira Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Benfica Lissabon – Vitoria Guimaraes (27. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Eredivisie
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Telstar – PSV Eindhoven (28. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The next title challenger in the UFC featherweight division could be determined when the Octagon makes its return to The O2 Arena in London, England on Saturday, March 22 as undefeated contenders Movsar Evloev and Lerone “The Miracle” Murphy clash in the main event. Sporting a 9-0 record in the UFC and a 19-0 mark overall, Evloev competes for the first time since besting former bantamweight titleholder Aljamain Sterling and holds additional wins over the likes of Diego Lopes, Arnold Allen and Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS - LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Meta APEX on Saturday, March 15 with an exciting event headlined by a critical featherweight matchup between tenured veteran Josh “CC0” Emmett and ascending Argentinian Kevin “El Chino” Vallejos. Emmett has been a mainstay in the Top 10 for several years, earning victories over the likes of Ricardo Lamas, Dan Ige and Bryce Mitchell along with challenging for the interim featherweight title at UFC 284.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ASTAF Sepaktakraw Asian Cup 2025 is set to take place from May 10 to May 18, 2025, at the prestigious Titiwangsa Indoor Stadium in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Chicago with a stacked card featuring one of the most highly anticipated middleweight title fights in years, as South African champion Dricus Du Plessis faces his toughest test to date against unbeaten challenger Khamzat Chimaev. Plus a whole lot more action on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 5
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 20
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 803 - UFC Connected "origins: Randy Brown, Locked In: Ailin Perez, Fighting For Change: Ode Osbourne
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Randy Brown unveils the hardships of his turbulent upbringing in Spanish Town, Jamaica, and his remarkable rise to the pinnacle of MMA. Argentinian Ailin Perez opens up about her fierce drive for competition in the UFC Women's Bantamweight Division. Ode Osbourne participates in a youth mentorship program, where he delivers an impactful message to the SASA Squad Foundation.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 325: Volkanovski vs. Lopes 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: On Sunday, February 1, UFC returns to Sydney Olympic Park, New South Wales, Australia for UFC 325 which will be headlined by a featherweight championship rematch between titleholder Alexander “The Great” Volkanovski and challenger Diego Lopes. The duo faced off for the vacant featherweight title last April at UFC 314 in Miami, with Volkanovski earning a unanimous decision victory to reclaim in the throne in the 145-pound weight class.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Evloev vs. Murphy - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The next title challenger in the UFC featherweight division could be determined when the Octagon makes its return to The O2 Arena in London, England on Saturday, March 22 as undefeated contenders Movsar Evloev and Lerone “The Miracle” Murphy clash in the main event. Sporting a 9-0 record in the UFC and a 19-0 mark overall, Evloev competes for the first time since besting former bantamweight titleholder Aljamain Sterling and holds additional wins over the likes of Diego Lopes, Arnold Allen and Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) UFC Fight Night: Adesanya vs. Pyfer - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When the UFC returns to Climate Pledge Arena in Seattle, Washington on Saturday, March 29, it brings with it a combustible middleweight main event pitting two-time former champion Israel “The Last Stylebender” Adesanya against ascending American Joe “Bodybagz” Pyfer. Inducted into the Fight Wing of the UFC Hall of Fame last summer, Adesanya is the only man to hold the UFC middleweight title twice, amassing victories over the likes of Robert Whittaker, Paulo Costa, Jared Cannonier and Alex Pereira during the course of his illustrious career.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Unleashed - 1803 - Lightweight Title
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When Khabib Nurmagomedov retired from MMA, the UFC's lightweight title was up for grabs. See the journey of the 155-pound belt following the Khabib Era on UFC Unleashed. Featuring Charles Oliveira, Dustin Poirier, Islam Makhachev, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: (L) AFL Premiership Season - Round 3 - Carlton vs Melbourne
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Connected - 803 - UFC Connected "origins: Randy Brown, Locked In: Ailin Perez, Fighting For Change: Ode Osbourne
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Randy Brown unveils the hardships of his turbulent upbringing in Spanish Town, Jamaica, and his remarkable rise to the pinnacle of MMA. Argentinian Ailin Perez opens up about her fierce drive for competition in the UFC Women's Bantamweight Division. Ode Osbourne participates in a youth mentorship program, where he delivers an impactful message to the SASA Squad Foundation.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Main Event - UFC 290: Moreno vs Pantoja 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: At UFC 290, Brandon Moreno faced the toughest test of his championship reign in a rematch against Alexandre Pantoja. See both athletes train and prepare ahead of their bout on this episode of UFC Main Event.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 1
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.
